mapper.select: SELECT corp_id, corp_name, business_registration_number, chief_name, /* display_mode 제거 */ phone_number, postal_code, address_line1, address_line2, introduction, photo_path, updated_at FROM com_corp WHERE is_deleted = FALSE AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT corp_id, corp_name, business_registration_number, chief_name, /* display_mode 제거 */ phone_number, postal_code, address_line1, address_line2, introduction, photo_path, updated_at FROM com_corp WHERE corp_id = #{corpId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com_corp ( corp_name, business_registration_number, chief_name, /* display_mode 제거 */ phone_number, postal_code, address_line1, address_line2, introduction, is_active, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, created_ip, updated_ip ) VALUES ( #{corpName}, #{businessRegistrationNumber}, #{chiefName}, /* display_mode 제거 */ #{phoneNumber}, #{postalCode}, #{addressLine1}, #{addressLine2}, #{introduction}, TRUE, FALSE, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{createdIp}, #{updatedIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE com_corp SET corp_name = #{corpName}, business_registration_number = #{businessRegistrationNumber}, chief_name = #{chiefName}, /* display_mode 제거 */ phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, postal_code = #{postalCode}, address_line1 = #{addressLine1}, address_line2 = #{addressLine2}, introduction = #{introduction}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_ip = #{updatedIp} WHERE corp_id = #{corpId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE com_corp SET is_deleted = TRUE, is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = 'system' WHERE corp_id = #{corpId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
